description: A vertical graphic card combining a photo background, a headline, and a quoted news excerpt, in DOL's branded style. The upper portion is a dark black-and-white photo of a welder in a welding helmet and gloves bent over their work in an industrial setting (a 'Lincoln Electric' helmet brand faintly visible). Across the lower-middle is a white serif headline 'High-Demand INVESTMENT' ('High-Demand' italic, 'INVESTMENT' bold). Below is a white rounded text box with a blue 'COMMUNITY COLLEGE DAILY' logo and black serif article text: 'The Labor Department will award up to five cooperative agreements for a four-year period of performance, focusing on growing newly developed registered apprenticeships, as well as expanding existing programs across industries. The industries DOL will focus on are AI/semiconductor/nuclear energy infrastructure build-out, shipbuilding and defense industrial base, information technology, healthcare, transportation, and telecommunication.' A faint DOL seal is centered at the bottom.
notable_text: High-Demand INVESTMENT; COMMUNITY COLLEGE DAILY; The Labor Department will award up to five cooperative agreements... focusing on growing newly developed registered apprenticeships... AI/semiconductor/nuclear energy infrastructure build-out, shipbuilding and defense industrial base...
